items.description: Three-piece jaw coupling with two sintered iron hubs and NBR spider insert. Accommodates 28 mm bores with standard keyway. Torque rating 190 Nm with vibration-damping elastomer element.
Class 125 bronze gate valve with threaded NPT ends and a non-rising stem. Solid wedge disc for positive shutoff in water and low-pressure steam lines. Meets MSS SP-80 specifications.
Totally enclosed fan-cooled induction motor, 5 HP at 1800 RPM. NEMA 184T frame with cast iron housing and Class F insulation. Rated for 230/460V three-phase operation with a 1.15 service factor.
Double-row spherical roller bearing with a 65 mm bore and brass cage. Self-aligning design tolerates up to 2 degrees of shaft misalignment. C3 internal clearance for high-temperature operation.
Double-row spherical roller bearing with a 65 mm bore and brass cage. Self-aligning design tolerates up to 2 degrees of shaft misalignment. C3 internal clearance for high-temperature operation.

End-suction centrifugal pump with cast iron volute and bronze impeller. Delivers up to 85 GPM at 60 feet of head on a 1.5 HP TEFC motor. Mechanical seal is carbon-ceramic rated for continuous duty. Suitable for clear water transfer and light industrial coolant loops.
Three-piece jaw coupling with two sintered iron hubs and NBR spider insert. Accommodates 28 mm bores with standard keyway. Torque rating 190 Nm with vibration-damping elastomer element.

Industrial pressure transmitter with 0-300 PSI gauge range and 4-20 mA output. 316L stainless wetted parts with 1/4" NPT process connection. Accuracy of 0.25% full scale, CE and UL rated. Operating temperature -40 to 105 C.
Tank-mounted return line filter with 10 micron cellulose element. Flow capacity of 40 GPM with integral bypass valve set at 25 PSI. Visual clogging indicator standard on the die-cast aluminum head.
Full-port two-piece ball valve in 316 stainless steel with PTFE seats. Rated to 1000 PSI WOG and suitable for steam service up to 150 PSI. Locking lever handle included as standard.
Relieving-type air pressure regulator with 1/2 inch NPT ports. Adjustable 5-125 PSI outlet range with 220 SCFM flow capacity. Polycarbonate bowl guard and panel-mount nut included.
Double-row spherical roller bearing with a 65 mm bore and brass cage. Self-aligning design tolerates up to 2 degrees of shaft misalignment. C3 internal clearance for high-temperature operation.

Industrial pressure transmitter with 0-300 PSI gauge range and 4-20 mA output. 316L stainless wetted parts with 1/4" NPT process connection. Accuracy of 0.25% full scale, CE and UL rated. Operating temperature -40 to 105 C.

Solenoid-driven diaphragm metering pump for chemical dosing applications. Adjustable output from 0.5 to 12 GPH with PVDF liquid end for aggressive media. Includes foot valve, injection fitting, and 6 feet of suction tubing.
Double-row spherical roller bearing with a 65 mm bore and brass cage. Self-aligning design tolerates up to 2 degrees of shaft misalignment. C3 internal clearance for high-temperature operation.

Rack-and-pinion pneumatic actuator, double-acting, 90 degree rotation. Output torque 350 in-lb at 80 PSI supply with NAMUR accessory mounting. Anodized aluminum body with stainless fasteners.
